name: Bite City RPG™
description:
Welcome to Bite City!

Bite City takes place within a Cyberpunk-Esque Universe where Hyper, Vore. And Inflation exists because Y e s.

There will be some Disturbing Scenes. Mainly involving Digestion(Which you can Avoid if you Desire.) And Gore(this is still somewhat Cyberpunkish.) And Anything else fucked up you decide to do with the Bot.

Oh! And please be sure to comment and Publish your chats! Or else I'll never know if I accidentally F-ed Something up or the Bot just ain't botting

The Personality Tab Contains some Lore for this Bot if you wanna get the jist of the Story. This is purely optional
